title: athlete — kill switches
description: Operational kill switches distinct from the tier-based entitlements. These are for emergency-off / staged rollout / per-tenant ops interventions. Every flag is ON in normal production; off flips are ops decisions.

flags.description: Master toggle for athlete create routes. Off = POST /athletes returns 503. Emergency-only (used during DB migrations of the athletes table or athlete_slot entitlement).
Off = PATCH /athletes/{athlete}/medical returns 503. Emergency-only if the medical-audit queue is unstable + we need to freeze writes to preserve audit integrity.
Off = GET /athletes/{athlete}/medical returns 503. Rarely used — reads don't create data integrity risk — but exists for compliance-freeze scenarios (regulator investigation with a hold order).
Off = POST + DELETE /athletes/{athlete}/consents return 503. Emergency-only during consent-workflow migrations.
Off = RollAthleteAgeGroupSnapshotJob no-ops. Used when a bad AgeGroup catalog change would cascade-corrupt snapshots — turn off + fix catalog + turn back on.
Off = CheckAthleteMinorTurnedAdultJob no-ops. Keeps existing consent snapshots + suppresses the AthleteMinorTurnedAdult notification cascade.
Off = ReconcileAthleteConsentsJob no-ops. Suppresses expiry reminders + consent-expired flag setting.
Off = AutoLinkAthleteToUserOnEmailMatchJob no-ops. Manual link only via /athletes/{athlete}/link-user.
Off = PurgeArchivedAthletesJob no-ops. Only flip off for maintenance windows or regulator-hold scenarios where retention pause is legally mandated.
